question: Which text overlay is displayed at the top of the screen while the artist presents the paint tubes? A. The Floss B. By Amy Pearce C. WINTON D. How to paint a vibrant turquoise background
What number is printed on the label of the dark grey paint tube shown by the artist?
What is the primary color of the large rectangular canvas used during the painting demonstration? A. Turquoise B. White C. Dark Grey D. Silver
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A person with light skin tone holds various tubes of oil paint over a large white rectangular canvas. The hands display different brands like Winton and The Floss while positioning them above the work surface. White text overlays reading "By Amy Pearce" and "www.herARTfromtheATTIC.blogspot.com" are positioned at the top and bottom of the screen. A white plastic bottle sits on the messy table near the canvas.

question: Did the video feature BOTH text about painting a turquoise background AND a paint tube labeled 'WINTON'? A. Only the turquoise background text B. Only the 'WINTON' paint tube C. Both the turquoise background text and 'WINTON' paint tube D. Neither the turquoise background text nor 'WINTON' paint tube
Where is the white plastic bottle positioned relative to the white canvas? A. left B. above C. in front D. right
Where is the text overlay 'By Amy Pearce' displayed on the screen? A. bottom B. top C. center D. left
What action is the person performing on the artwork in this clip?
Describe the sequence of actions and items presented by the artist from the canvas introduction to the paint tube display.
canonical_answer: At 6s, a hand touches the large white rectangular canvas; at 8s, the hand reaches towards a white plastic bottle on the left; at 10s, hands hold dark grey and white paint tubes; at 14s, the person rotates a white paint tube; at 18s, the person displays three tubes including a large silver one.
